overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a bustling medieval European town. The character navigates from a lower market square up steep cobblestone streets through stone archways, eventually reaching an upper town plaza with a central gazebo, surrounded by half-timbered buildings and market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval market square with vendor stalls

events.description: passing through large stone archway into bustling market square
horse slows to navigate around market stalls and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding a brown horse through the market square, navigating between red-and-white striped vendor stalls and scattered townspeople

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking across the cobblestone path

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway with heavy wooden doors marking the town entrance
wooden market stall with red and white striped canvas canopy displaying vegetables and goods
open cobblestone plaza with irregular stone paving patterns
traditional medieval half-timbered houses with exposed wooden beams and plaster facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with Geralt riding through a massive stone archway into a sunlit medieval market square. Red and white striped vendor stalls line the cobblestone plaza while townspeople wander about. The horse navigates slowly through the scattered crowd, passing a wooden cart on the right and vegetable crates near the stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway passage connecting lower and upper town

events.description: turning left and entering covered stone tunnel archway
emerging from shadowed tunnel into bright sunlight of uphill street

agents.ego_description: riding through the covered stone archway passage and emerging into the steep uphill street

notable_agents.action: group of three townspeople walking downhill toward the camera

entered.detail: tunnel-like stone passage with curved ceiling and rough stone walls
narrow cobblestone road rising steeply uphill between stone buildings

segments.scene_description: The horse turns left into a narrow covered stone archway, transitioning from the bright market into shadow. After passing through the tunnel, the scene opens onto a steep cobblestone street rising uphill. Townspeople walk downhill toward the camera as the horse begins its ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep residential street with merchant stalls and overlook

events.description: beginning steep ascent up the cobblestone hill with view of lower town visible
passing close to wooden merchant cart temporarily blocking right side view

agents.ego_description: riding steadily uphill on the steep cobblestone street, navigating past pedestrians and wooden carts

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking up the hill ahead of the horse

entered.detail: low stone parapet wall with decorative pillars overlooking the lower town
view of lower town buildings, water, and distant landscape visible below the street level
wooden stall with red awning and barrels displaying goods on the right side of street

segments.scene_description: The horse ascends the steep cobblestone street, with a stone railing on the left revealing a view of the lower town and water below. Wooden merchant stalls line the right side of the street. The camera passes close to a cart loaded with barrels, temporarily obscuring the view, while navigating around townspeople walking uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town gate with large stone archway and bannered buildings

events.description: approaching and passing through large stone town gate archway at top of hill
turning right onto upper level street after passing through gate

agents.ego_description: passing through the massive town gate archway and turning right onto the upper town street

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside wooden cart loaded with barrels and crates

entered.detail: massive medieval stone archway with wooden portcullis marking the upper town gate
large half-timbered building with red and black banners hanging from upper facade
external wooden staircase with railings attached to the building front

segments.scene_description: The horse approaches and passes through a massive stone gate archway marking the entrance to the upper town. A prominent building with red banners and external wooden stairs stands on the left. After passing through the gate, the horse turns right onto a wider street lined with merchant carts and barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town plaza with central gazebo and market stalls

events.description: entering open plaza area with octagonal wooden gazebo in center
slowing to navigate around plaza pedestrians and gazebo perimeter

agents.ego_description: riding through the upper town plaza, approaching and circling the central gazebo structure

entered.detail: wooden bandstand with pointed shingled roof and open sides in center of plaza
colorful canvas market tents with green and orange roofs along plaza edge
circular stone platform surrounding the gazebo base

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious town plaza with an octagonal wooden gazebo at its center. Colorful market tents with green and orange canvas roofs line the edges of the cobblestone square. The horse rides toward the gazebo, slowing to navigate around the scattered pedestrians and the circular stone platform surrounding the bandstand.

scene_state.functional_zone: town plaza with central gathering space and shade trees

events.description: making a wide left turn around the gazebo to explore the plaza
passing by groups of seated NPCs resting near wooden crates and benches

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride around the plaza, making a wide turn past the gazebo and passing seated townspeople

notable_agents.action: seated merchant resting on wooden crates beside the plaza edge

entered.detail: mature deciduous tree with dense green canopy providing shade over part of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The horse makes a wide left turn around the plaza, passing the gazebo now positioned to the right. A large oak tree with dense green foliage stands on the left, shading part of the square. The camera passes seated merchants resting near wooden crates while continuing to explore the open cobblestone plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt rides from a bustling lower market square up through narrow stone passages into a spacious upper town plaza. It begins by passing through a massive stone archway into a sunlit plaza filled with red and white striped vendor stalls and wandering townspeople. As the horse turns left into a shadowed stone tunnel, the scene opens onto a steep cobblestone ascent where the view expands to reveal the lower town and water below. The camera then passes through another grand gate archway marked by red banners before turning right onto a wider street lined with merchant carts. Finally, the path opens into a wide plaza featuring an octagonal wooden gazebo and colorful canvas tents, moving past a large shading oak tree and resting merchants across the open cobblestones.
